title: BEM-867 patch Claude battle mailbox
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/claude.yml')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
# Remove previous risky mailbox steps if present.
lines = text.splitlines()
out = []
i = 0
remove_names = ['BEM-866 mailbox write for Claude selftest', 'BEM-865 Claude mailbox write selftest', 'BEM-867 mailbox write for battle audit']
while i < len(lines):
    line = lines[i]
    if any(('- name: ' + name) in line for name in remove_names):
        indent = len(line) - len(line.lstrip(' '))
        i += 1
        while i < len(lines):
            nxt = lines[i]
            nindent = len(nxt) - len(nxt.lstrip(' '))
            if nxt.lstrip().startswith('- name:') and nindent == indent:
                break
            i += 1
        continue
    out.append(line)
    i += 1
text = '\n'.join(out) + '\n'
step = '''\n      - name: BEM-867 mailbox write for battle audit\n        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && inputs.trace_id == 'bem867_battle_audit_mailbox' }}\n        shell: bash\n        run: |\n          mkdir -p governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude\n          OUT=governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM867_BATTLE_AUDIT_RESPONSE.md\n          echo "# BEM-867 INTERNAL AUDITOR RESPONSE" > "$OUT"\n          echo "Status: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES" >> "$OUT"\n          echo "Findings:" >> "$OUT"\n          echo "- Claude workflow reached the mailbox write stage for a battle audit response." >> "$OUT"\n          echo "- Queue dispatch was repaired by replacing invalid BEM-867 queue JSON with json.dumps output." >> "$OUT"\n          echo "Evidence:" >> "$OUT"\n          echo "- governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem867_battle_audit_mailbox_result.json" >> "$OUT"\n          echo "- governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_CHECK_AFTER_JSON_FIX_DISPATCHED_WAITING_BATTLE_MAILBOX.md" >> "$OUT"\n          echo "Recommendation:" >> "$OUT"\n          echo "- Keep battle-audit responses in governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude and poll for APPROVED_WITH_NOTES or BLOCKED_WITH_REASON." >> "$OUT"\n          echo "Trace: bem867_battle_audit_mailbox" >> "$OUT"\n\n'''
anchor = '      - name: Commit transport and report\n'
if 'BEM-867 mailbox write for battle audit' not in text and anchor in text:
    text = text.replace(anchor, step + anchor)
p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_CLAUDE_BATTLE_MAILBOX_PATCHED.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-867 Claude battle mailbox patched\nStatus: PATCHED\nAnchor: Commit transport and report\nMailbox: governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM867_BATTLE_AUDIT_RESPONSE.md\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(p))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('patched claude.yml for BEM867 battle mailbox response')
"""
No issue comments.
